content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

February 6, 2012

Gerri Graham-Mejia
4405 Green Street, #5
Los Alamitos, CA 990720

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-12-029

Dear Ms. Graham-Mejia:

This letter confirms the receipt of your January 30, 2012, request for advice regarding the Los Alamitos City Council. Under the provisions of Regulations 18329, unless you are an authorized representative of the persons for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(B) and (c)(1).) The Commission does not provide advice about an official’s duties to third parties. Therefore, your request is withdrawn. I enclose a copy of Regulation 18329 for your review.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Zackery P. Morazzini
General Counsel

by: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

JWW:jgl

Enclosure
